Entry.DisplayName: Aplicaciones de Microsoft 365 para negocios - es-es
Entry.ModifyPath: C:\Program Files\Common Files\Microsoft Shared\ClickToRun\OfficeClickToRun.exe" scenario=repair platform=x64 culture=es-es
Entry.UninstallString: "C:\Program Files\Common Files\Microsoft Shared\ClickToRun\OfficeClickToRun.exe" scenario=install scenariosubtype=ARP sourcetype=None productstoremove=O365BusinessRetail.16_es-es_x-none culture=es-es version.16=16.0

Entry.InstallLocation: C:\Program Files\Patch My PC\Patch My PC Home Updater
Entry.InstallSource: C:\ProgramData\Patch My PC\Patch My PC Home Updater\updates\PROD_5.4.4.0

Entry.DisplayName: Microsoft Visual C++ 2022 X64 Additional Runtime - 14.44.35211
Microsoft Teams Meeting Add-in for Microsoft Office
Microsoft Visual C++ 2022 X86 Minimum Runtime - 14.44.35211
Microsoft Visual C++ 2022 X86 Additional Runtime - 14.44.35211

Entry.Comment: 7-Zip is a file archiver with a high compression ratio.
7-Zip is a file archiver with a high compression ratio.
Reliable and free network scanner to analyse LAN.
Reliable and free network scanner to analyse LAN.

AutoHotkey is a free, open source macro-creation and automation software utility that allows users to automate repetitive tasks. It is driven by a custom scripting language that is aimed specifically at providing keyboard shortcuts, otherwise known as hotkeys.
A secure and free password manager for all of your devices.
A browser that lets you browse safer and faster by blocking ads and trackers.
Chocolatey is the package manager for Windows (like apt-get but for Windows)
Extension package to provide compatibility with older versions of Chocolatey
Helper functions extending core choco functionality
Helper functions useful for developing packages for Microsoft .NET Framework runtime and Developer Pack.
Helper functions useful for developing packages for Windows updates (KBs).
The .NET Framework is a development platform for building apps for web, Windows, Windows Phone, Windows Server, and Microsoft Azure.
The industry's most powerful PDF Reader solution.

Entry.DisplayName: Windows RT 8.1, Windows 8.1, and Windows Server 2012 R2 update: April 2014 (KB2919355)
Entry.Comment: This update is a cumulative update that includes the security updates and the non-security updates for Windows RT 8.1, Windows 8.1, and Windows Server 2012 R2 that were released before March 2014.

Entry.DisplayName: March 2014 servicing stack update for Windows 8.1 and Windows Server 2012 R2 (KB2919442)
Entry.Comment: The update fixes some issues in the servicing stack of Windows 8.1 and Windows Server 2012 R2.

Entry.DisplayName: Update for Universal C Runtime in Windows (KB2999226)
Entry.Comment: Update for Universal C Runtime (CRT) in Windows. Before you install this update, check out the prerequisites section.

Entry.DisplayName: Microsoft security advisory: Availability of SHA-2 code signing support for Windows 7 and Windows Server 2008 R2: March 10, 2015
Entry.Comment: The update adds SHA-2 hashing algorithm signing and verification support to Windows 7 and Windows Server 2008 R2

Entry.DisplayName: Security update for Windows kernel: March 10, 2015
Entry.Comment: This security update resolves privately reported vulnerabilities in Windows.
Vim-fork focused on extensibility and usability.
Node.js is a JavaScript runtime built on Chrome's V8 JavaScript engine
Notepad++ is a free (as in "free speech" and also as in "free beer") source code editor and Notepad replacement that supports several languages.
Notepad++ is a free (as in "free speech" and also as in "free beer") source code editor and Notepad replacement that supports several languages.

Entry.DisplayName: OpenVPN - Open Source SSL VPN Solution
Entry.Comment: A full-featured open source SSL VPN solution
Screen capture, file sharing and productivity tool.
Cloud-based synchronized messaging app with a focus on speed and security
Cloud-based synchronized messaging app with a focus on speed and security

Entry.DisplayName: Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable for Visual Studio 2015-2022
Entry.Comment: Run-time components that are required to run C++ applications that are built by using Visual Studio 2015-2022

Entry.DisplayName: Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable for Visual Studio 2015 Update 3 (with hotfix 2016-09-14)
Entry.Comment: Run-time components that are required to run C++ applications that are built by using Visual Studio 2015 Update 3
